title: Aerangis mooreana
taxonomy: Aerangis mooreana is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Aerangis, which is a group of orchids commonly known as 'mouse orchids' or 'mouse lemur orchids'. Within the Orchidaceae family, Aerangis mooreana is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification helps to group Aerangis mooreana with other orchids that share similar characteristics. The species is native to Madagascar and is known for its unique and delicate appearance.
